debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

proof:
have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  have hm : 0 < S.m := S.m_pos
  have hk : 0 < S.k := S.k_pos
  have hωsq : S.ω ^ 2 = S.k / S.m := S.ω_sq
  have h_energy := trajectory_energy S IC
  have h_at_t := congrFun h_energy t
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, smul_eq_mul] at h_at_t
  have hkne : S.k ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hk
  have hmne : S.m ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hm
  have key : S.k * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rw [div_pow, hωsq]; field_simp
  constructor
  · intro hvel
    rw [hvel] at h_at_t
    simp only [norm_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, mul_zero,
      zero_add] at h_at_t
    have h1 : S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by linarith
    have h2 : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      have h3 : S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
        rw [mul_add, h1, ← key]; ring
      exact mul_left_cancel₀ hkne h3
    rw [← Real.sqrt_sq (norm_nonneg _), h2]
  · intro hpos
    have hpos_sq : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      rw [hpos]; exact Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)
    have h3 : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
      have h_sub : 1 / 2 * S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 +
                   1 / 2 * S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) =
                   1 / 2 * (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by rw [← hpos_sq]; linarith
      have h_key2 : S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) = S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [mul_add, key]
      linarith
    have h4 : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖]
    rw [sq_eq_zero_iff, norm_eq_zero] at h4
    exact h4
successful_attempts:
have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  have hm : 0 < S.m := S.m_pos
  have hk : 0 < S.k := S.k_pos
  have hωsq : S.ω ^ 2 = S.k / S.m := S.ω_sq
  have h_energy := trajectory_energy S IC
  have h_at_t := congrFun h_energy t
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, smul_eq_mul] at h_at_t
  have hkne : S.k ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hk
  have hmne : S.m ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hm
  have key : S.k * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    rw [div_pow, hωsq]; field_simp
  constructor
  · intro hvel
    rw [hvel] at h_at_t
    simp only [norm_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, mul_zero,
      zero_add] at h_at_t
    have h1 : S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by linarith
    have h2 : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      have h3 : S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
        rw [mul_add, h1, ← key]; ring
      exact mul_left_cancel₀ hkne h3
    rw [← Real.sqrt_sq (norm_nonneg _), h2]
  · intro hpos
    have hpos_sq : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      rw [hpos]; exact Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)
    have h3 : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
      have h_sub : 1 / 2 * S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 +
                   1 / 2 * S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) =
                   1 / 2 * (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by rw [← hpos_sq]; linarith
      have h_key2 : S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) = S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [mul_add, key]
      linarith
    have h4 : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖]
    rw [sq_eq_zero_iff, norm_eq_zero] at h4
    exact h4
